G4031.strongs_def: strong all around, i.e. a master (manager)

G4011.derivation: probably from the same as G4010 (Πέργαμος);
G4011.strongs_def: a tower; Perga, a place in Asia Minor

G4007.strongs_def: an enclitic particle significant of abundance (thoroughness), i.e. emphasis; much, very or ever

G4029.strongs_def: to lie all around, i.e. inclose, encircle, hamper (literally or figuratively)

G4060.strongs_def: to place around; by implication, to present
G4060.kjv_def: bestow upon, hedge round about, put about (on, upon), set about

G4020.strongs_def: to work all around, i.e. bustle about (meddle)

G4047.strongs_def: acquisition (the act or the thing); by extension, preservation

G4034.strongs_def: to illuminate all around, i.e. invest with a halo

G4067.derivation: from a comparative of G4012 (περί) and (to rub);
G4067.strongs_def: something brushed all around, i.e. off-scrapings (figuratively, scum)

G4019.strongs_def: to bind around one, i.e. enwrap

G4071.derivation: neuter of a derivative of G4072 (πέτομαι);

G4012.strongs_def: properly, through (all over), i.e. around; figuratively with respect to; used in various applications, of place, cause or time (with the genitive case denoting the subject or occasion or superlative point; with the accusative case the locality, circuit, matter, circumstance or general period)
G4012.kjv_def: (there-)about, above, against, at, on behalf of, X and his company, which concern, (as) concerning, for, X how it will go with, ((there-, where-)) of, on, over, pertaining (to), for sake, X (e-)state, (as) touching, (where-)by (in), with

G4073.derivation: feminine of the same as G4074 (Πέτρος);

G4097.strongs_def: from the base of G4008 (πέραν)); to traffic (by travelling), i.e. dispose of as merchandise or into slavery (literally or figuratively)

G4091.strongs_def: close-pressed, i.e. firm; Pilatus, a Roman

G4057.kjv_def: exceedingly, out of measure, the more

G4014.derivation: from G4012 (περί) and G138 (αἱρέομαι) (including its alternate);
G4014.strongs_def: to remove all around, i.e. unveil, cast off (anchor); figuratively, to expiate

G4062.derivation: from G4012 (περί) and the base of G5157 (τροπή);
G4062.strongs_def: to turn around, i.e. (mentally) to craze

G4008.derivation: apparently accusative case of an obsolete derivative of (to "pierce");
G4008.strongs_def: through (as adverb or preposition), i.e. across

G4044.derivation: from G4012 (περί) and the base of G4008 (πέραν);

G4077.derivation: probably from G4078 (πήγνυμι) (through the idea of gushing plumply);
G4077.strongs_def: a fount (literally or figuratively), i.e. source or supply (of water, blood, enjoyment) (not necessarily the original spring)

G4006.derivation: from the perfect of the alternate of G3958 (πάσχω);

G4066.strongs_def: around the region, i.e. circumjacent (as noun, with G1093 (γῆ) implied vicinity)
G4066.kjv_def: country (round) about, region (that lieth) round about

G4095.derivation: a prolonged form of ; which (together with another form) ; occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses;

G4092.derivation: a reduplicated and prolonged form of a primary ; which occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses);
G4092.strongs_def: to fire, i.e. burn (figuratively and passively, become inflamed with fever)

G4035.strongs_def: to leave all around, i.e. (passively) survive

G4072.derivation: middle voice of a primary verb;

G4016.strongs_def: to throw all around, i.e. invest (with a palisade or with clothing)
G4016.kjv_def: array, cast about, clothe(-d me), put on

G4063.derivation: from G4012 (περί) and G5143 (τρέχω) (including its alternate);

G4098.derivation: probably akin to G4072 (πέτομαι) through the idea of alighting;

G4059.derivation: from G4012 (περί) and the base of G5114 (τομώτερος);
G4059.strongs_def: to cut around, i.e. (specially) to circumcise

G4084.strongs_def: to squeeze, i.e. seize (gently by the hand (press), or officially (arrest), or in hunting (capture))
G4084.kjv_def: apprehend, catch, lay hand on, take

G4070.strongs_def: the by-gone, i.e. (as noun) last year

G4033.strongs_def: to encircle all around, i.e. blockade completely

G4086.derivation: from a compound of a derivative of G3982 (πείθω) and G3056 (λόγος);

G4022.derivation: from G4012 (περί) and G2064 (ἔρχομαι) (including its alternate);
G4022.strongs_def: to come all around, i.e. stroll, vacillate, veer
G4022.kjv_def: fetch a compass, vagabond, wandering about

G4064.strongs_def: to convey around, i.e. transport hither and thither

G4068.strongs_def: perhaps by reduplication of the base of G4008 (πέραν)); to boast

G4032.strongs_def: to conceal all around, i.e. entirely

G4042.strongs_def: a being held around, i.e. (concretely) a passage (of Scripture, as circumscribed)

G4051.kjv_def: abundance, that was left, over and above

G4083.strongs_def: the fore-arm, i.e. (as a measure) a cubit

G4082.strongs_def: a wallet or leather pouch for food

G4076.strongs_def: rue (from its thick or fleshy leaves)

G4039.strongs_def: to reside around, i.e. be a neighbor

G4056.kjv_def: more abundant(-ly), X the more earnest, (more) exceedingly, more frequent, much more, the rather

G4023.strongs_def: to hold all around, i.e. include, clasp (figuratively)

G4026.strongs_def: to stand all around, i.e. (near) to be a bystander, or (aloof) to keep away from

G4078.derivation: a prolonged form of a primary verb (which in its simpler form occurs only as an alternate in certain tenses);
G4078.strongs_def: to fix ("peg"), i.e. (specially) to set up (a tent)

G4040.strongs_def: housed around, i.e. neighboring (used elliptically as a noun)

G4003.derivation: from G4002 (πέντε) and G2532 (καί) and G1182 (δέκατος);

G4038.strongs_def: all around, i.e. (as an adjective) circumjacent

G4074.strongs_def: a (piece of) rock (larger than G3037 (λίθος)); as a name, Petrus, an apostle

G4030.derivation: feminine of a compound of G4012 (περί) and G2776 (κεφαλή);
G4030.strongs_def: encirclement of the head, i.e. a helmet

G4048.strongs_def: to tear all around, i.e. completely away

G4043.strongs_def: to tread all around, i.e. walk at large (especially as proof of ability); figuratively, to live, deport oneself, follow (as a companion or votary)

G4018.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of G4016 (περιβάλλω);
G4018.strongs_def: something thrown around one, i.e. a mantle, veil

G4010.strongs_def: fortified; Pergamus, a place in Asia Minor

G4024.strongs_def: to gird all around, i.e. (middle voice or passive) to fasten on one's belt (literally or figuratively)

G4069.strongs_def: a Persian woman; Persis, a Christian female

G4041.derivation: from the present participle feminine of a compound of 4012 and G1510 (εἰμί);
G4041.strongs_def: being beyond usual, i.e. special (one's own)

G4099.strongs_def: Pisidia, a region of Asia Minor

G4052.strongs_def: to superabound (in quantity or quality), be in excess, be superfluous; also (transitively) to cause to superabound or excel
G4052.kjv_def: (make, more) abound, (have, have more) abundance (be more) abundant, be the better, enough and to spare, exceed, excel, increase, be left, redound, remain (over and above)
G4052.usage: abound(17x), abundance(3x), remain(3x), exceed(2x), increase(2x), redound(1x)

G4005.derivation: feminine of the ordinal of G4004 (πεντήκοντα);
G4005.strongs_def: fiftieth (G2250 (ἡμέρα) being implied) from Passover, i.e. the festival of "Pentecost"

G4025.strongs_def: a putting all around, i.e. decorating oneself with

G4096.strongs_def: perhaps akin to the alternate of G4095 (πίνω) through the idea of repletion); plumpness, i.e. (by implication) richness (oiliness)

G4027.strongs_def: something cleaned off all around, i.e. refuse (figuratively)

G4079.derivation: neuter of a (presumed) derivative of (the blade of an oar;
G4079.strongs_def: from the same as G3976 (πέδη)); a "pedal", i.e. helm

G4021.strongs_def: working all around, i.e. officious (meddlesome, neuter plural magic)

G4013.strongs_def: to take around (as a companion); reflexively, to walk around

G4046.derivation: middle voice from G4012 (περί) and G4160 (ποιέω);
G4046.strongs_def: to make around oneself, i.e. acquire (buy)

G4055.strongs_def: more superabundant (in number, degree or character)

G4015.strongs_def: to flash all around, i.e. envelop in light

G4080.derivation: a quantitative form (the feminine) of the base of G4225 (πού);
G4080.strongs_def: how much (as an indefinite), i.e. in size or (figuratively) dignity

G4036.strongs_def: grieved all around, i.e. intensely sad

G4028.strongs_def: to cover all around, i.e. entirely (the face, a surface)

G4049.strongs_def: to drag all around, i.e. (figuratively) to distract (with care)

G4089.derivation: perhaps from G4078 (πήγνυμι) (through the idea of piercing);

G4053.derivation: from G4012 (περί) (in the sense of beyond);
G4053.strongs_def: superabundant (in quantity) or superior (in quality); by implication, excessive; adverbially (with G1537 (ἐκ)) violently; neuter (as noun) preeminence
G4053.kjv_def: exceeding abundantly above, more abundantly, advantage, exceedingly, very highly, beyond measure, more, superfluous, vehement(-ly)

G4045.strongs_def: to fall into something that is all around, i.e. light among or upon, be surrounded with

G4054.kjv_def: more abundantly, a great deal, far more
